div.head: The Chargé in the United Kingdom (Johnson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 630. From American delegates to Sugar Council. Department’s 404, October 1, 5 p.m., penultimate paragraph.

Following resolution adopted yesterday afternoon by plenary session of Council:
“Considering that the majority of governments have already either ratified the Agreement or made declarations under article 4 of the Protocol, and that a number of other ratifications are shortly expected:
Resolves to recommend those governments which have ratified the Agreement or have made declarations under article 4 of the protocol to consider the Agreement as being in force between themselves until further notice and trusts that those governments which have not yet ratified or made a declaration will treat the Agreement as being in force between themselves and other signatories.”
